data.content:
# Handoff — implementation complete

Artifact:
- Branch: worktree-foolery-f354-bulk-ship-action
- Commit: 54fea985

Delivered:
- Queue row state dropdown now includes a Correction section that surfaces terminal targets like Shipped and routes them through the same markTerminal correction path.
- Queue multi-select action bar now shows a dedicated Ship action that ships selected beats directly and still skips already-terminal beats via the existing guard/toast flow.
- Beat detail terminal state changes now route through markTerminalOrThrow instead of the generic PATCH update path, so Shipped succeeds there too.

Validation:
- bun run lint
- bunx tsc --noEmit
- bun run test
- bun run build
- Playwright (mocked /api/beats on http://127.0.0.1:3100): per-row ship, bulk ship, and beat-detail ship all transitioned to Shipped with loadCount=1 (no full page reload during the state changes).
